name: CYPHERPUNK TECHNOLOGIES INC.
summary: PARTI Corporate Information We were incorporated in the state of Delaware on January 3, 2011. Our wholly owned subsidiaries as of December 31, 2025 include HealthCare Pharmaceuticals Pty Ltd. (HCP Australia), Leap Securities Corp., Flame Biosciences LLC, and Leap Therapeutics, Inc. (Leap). Prior to October 2025, we devoted substantially all of our resources to development efforts related to biomarker-targeted antibody therapies designed to treat patients with cancer.
